one_time_description: Unrealized gains on Agricultural Benefits Settlement Trust investments (remeasurement gains)
economic_notes: Nation operates Sucker Creek Holdings Ltd., Sucker Creek Gas Utility, Sucker Creek First Nation Co-op, SCFN Ventures LP, and SCFN Services LP as government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method. Agricultural Benefits Settlement Trust holds ~$81.5M in investments (mutual funds and fixed income). Tourism and marina economic development activities noted.
notes: Audit is qualified on two bases: (1) asset retirement obligations not estimated or recorded, and (2) insufficient audit evidence regarding investments and advances in related First Nation entities. Prior period restatement of $8,951,500 to correct Agricultural Benefits Settlement Trust from cost to fair value accounting. SCFN Agricultural Benefits Settlement Trust (~$81.5M) is fully consolidated with December 31 fiscal year end. Five GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Financial information for SCFN Services LP and SCFN Ventures LP not available for the year. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $18,045,141 + LSLIRC $989,906 + Government of Alberta $211,650 + CMHC $608,203 = $19,854,900 (LSLIRC included as regional council transfer). OSR calculated as total revenue minus all government transfers. Remuneration schedule not included in extracted text. Expenses include Other $4,490,760, Community Services $913,011, and Economic Development $3,124,795 not mapped to standard categories.
